history.text: Unification brought separate territories or communities into a single state framework.
Treaty of Friendship set new terms for sovereignty or administration.
Tonga became independent from the United Kingdom, marking a key step in modern statehood.

worthSeeing.title: Whale Watching:
worthSeeing.text: Swim with humpback whales in the warm waters of Vava'u, one of the world's best whale encounters.

worthSeeing.title: Ha'apai Islands:
worthSeeing.text: Remote, unspoiled island group of coral atolls and volcanic islands with minimal tourism.

worthSeeing.title: Ancient Tongan Culture:
worthSeeing.text: The only Pacific monarchy, with a living royal family and rich traditional ceremonies.
